title: phegopteris angelicifolia
intro: Phegopteris angelicifolia, also known as the angel fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris angelicifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used as a poultice to apply directly to the skin.
